title: Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron sued for alleged collusion in the RAM market
summary: A class action lawsuit accuses the three largest memory makers of price fixing and restricting supply, driving up component costs.

title: Netflix releases first trailer for second season of Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
summary: The animated series returns in autumn with an even more violent story and new characters in Night City.

title: GTA 6 breaks pre-order records on Xbox and will not include a physical disc at launch
summary: Rockstar's highly anticipated game generates high demand, controversy over its digital format, and resale warnings.

title: Netflix develops a live-action Persona series
summary: The popular Persona video game franchise will have a live-action adaptation on Netflix with Deadpool's director and Star Trek's screenwriter.

title: Nintendo announces a Direct dedicated to Splatoon Raiders for June 30
summary: The Japanese company will hold a special event focused on the new Splatoon series game, showcasing new features and gameplay.

title: Sony suggests PlayStation 6 will be expensive and won't be sold at a significant loss
summary: The increase in component costs will affect the final price of the console, which could exceed $900 according to executives.

title: Companion Cube case for Steam Machine canceled for not having Valve's permission
summary: Dbrand manufactured a Portal-themed case without authorization, and Valve forced them to stop its production and sale.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 ads emphasize it will not be on Xbox Game Pass
summary: The advertising campaigns for the new CoD stress that the game will not be included in Xbox's subscription service this year.

title: CD Projekt unifies its brand under the name CD Projekt Red
summary: The Polish company simplifies its corporate identity by adopting the name of its development studio for the entire company.

title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls announces open beta and new team of heroes
summary: The Marvel fighting game introduces Blade, Deadpool, and Loki as a playable team and confirms open tests on PS5 and PC.

title: Xbox pauses signing new third-party deals for Game Pass
summary: According to reports, Microsoft has halted negotiations to add third-party games to its subscription service.

title: Steam Machine pre-orders resold at inflated prices on eBay
summary: High demand for Valve's device leads some users to resell it with markups of up to $235.

title: Tekken 8 adds Roger Jr. and Bob as downloadable characters
summary: Bandai Namco's fighting game expands its roster with two classic fighters, generating excitement among fans.

title: Meccha Chameleon becomes a phenomenon on Steam and fans bring it to real life
summary: The peculiar camouflage game attracts a large community that organizes offline matches inspired by the title.

title: Xbox workers demand labor protections amid potential layoffs
summary: Unionized employees of Microsoft's gaming division speak out against cuts and ask to be treated with dignity.

title: Sony insists on betting on games as a service despite setbacks
summary: The company plans to revitalize its live-service strategy after canceling several projects and cutting staff at key studios.

title: Supermassive Games CEO resigns after a period of layoffs and releases
summary: The executive leaves the studio behind Until Dawn and The Quarry amid restructuring and the recent release of Directive 8020.

title: Shortages and price hikes affect Pokémon TCG cards in 2026
summary: High demand and retailer practices make it difficult to acquire the best cards in the collection.

title: Acclaimed stage play of Spirited Away comes to the United States
summary: The stage adaptation of the Studio Ghibli classic will be presented in American theaters after its success in Japan and the United Kingdom.

title: Rainbow Six Siege developers begin strike at Ubisoft Barcelona
summary: Employees protest against mass layoffs and return-to-office policies, paralyzing work during July.
